summary: DentView DICOM viewer app fully tested. All backend and frontend tests passed successfully. Backend health endpoint working. Frontend home screen renders correctly with all UI elements, theme toggle works, demo mode loads and displays synthetic dental X-ray. Viewer screen fully functional with all 7 tools, W/L presets, info panel with correct metadata, and navigation.

issues: Console warning: shadow* style props are deprecated, should use boxShadow instead (in index.tsx line 239)

action_items: Replace deprecated shadow* props with boxShadow in /app/frontend/app/index.tsx (non-critical)
critical_code_review_comments: All interactive elements properly have testID attributes for testing
React Native components used correctly (View, Text, TouchableOpacity)
Theme context implementation is solid with dark mode default
WebView communication via postMessage working correctly
DICOM viewer HTML successfully loads dicomParser from CDN and generates demo image
File store pattern is simple and effective for client-side data management
Backend minimal but functional with proper /api prefix and CORS setup
seed_data_creation: No seed data required. Demo mode generates synthetic dental X-ray client-side in WebView.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working. Demo mode successfully generates synthetic dental X-ray with teeth pattern visible. Info panel shows correct metadata (DEMO Patient, 2024-01-15, PX, 512×400px). All tools functional. One minor deprecation warning for shadow* props (non-critical). Backend health endpoint working. No mocked APIs - all processing client-side.
